person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
«b»Biography«/b»
Hawise, daughter of Saher de Quincy, Knt., 1st Earl of Winchester, and Margaret, daughter of Robert de Bréteuil, Knt., 2nd Earl of Leicester was probably born between 1200 and 1212.

Hawise married Hugh de Vere, 4th Earl of Oxford about February 1222/23 (date of fine) (after 11 February 1223). Hugh, son of Robert de Vere and his wife Isabel de Bolebec, was born about 1210 "(came of age in 1231)". They had one son and three daughters:
1.) Robert de Vere, Knt., 5th Earl of Oxford, married Alice de Stanford

2.) Isabel de Vere, married (1) John de Courtenay, Knt., (2) Oliver de Dinham, Knt.

3.) Lora de Vere, married Reynold d'Argentine, Knt.

4.) Margaret de Vere, married Hugh de Cressy

Hawise was living in 1273 and died on 3 February (year unknown). She and her husband Hugh, who died before 23 December 1263, were buried at Earls Colne.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Countess Hawise de Quincy於1184年12月10日出生在英國哈普爾維古姆時，她的父親Saer de Quincy 1st Earl of Winchester24歲，母親Margaret de Beaumont30歲。她於1223年2月25日與Sir Hugh de Vere 4th Earl of Oxford在英國英格蘭哈普爾維古姆結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1263年2月3日在英國艾可享年78歲，埋葬在英國艾可易阿爾斯 可爾內。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Countess Hawise de Quincy于1184年12月10日出生在英国哈普爾維古姆时，她的父亲Saer de Quincy 1st Earl of Winchester24岁，母亲Margaret de Beaumont30岁。她于1223年2月25日与Sir Hugh de Vere 4th Earl of Oxford在英国英格兰哈普爾維古姆结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1263年2月3日在英国艾可享年78岁，埋葬在英国艾可易阿爾斯 可爾內。

nameMeanings.name: Quincy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from any of several places in France deriving their names from the Gallo-Roman personal name Quintus, meaning ‘fifth(-born)’ + the locative suffix -acum. The earliest bearer of the name in England, that of Saer de Quincy, ancestor of the earls of Winchester, was from Cuinchy in Pas-de-Calais, but the name may have been reinforced by immigrants from Quincy-sous-Sénard in Seine-et-Oise or Quincy-Voisins in Seine-et-Marne. A family of the name de Quincy held the title Earl of Winchester 1207–65. Descendants of this family later bore the name Quincey up to the time of the English essayist Thomas De Quincey (1785–1859), who changed his name from Quincey to De Quincey in 1796.

History: The American Quincy family were established in MA by Edmund Quincy in 1633. Fifth in descent was Josiah Quincy (1744–75), a leading patriot, who was sent to England to argue the colonists’ case in 1774. His son Josiah (1772–1864) was a powerful opponent of slavery, president of Harvard, and mayor of Boston, a post also held by several of his descendants. The traditional pronunciation is “Quinzy”.

nameMeanings.name: Hawise
meanings: This female name (which has been corrupted down to Avice and Avis) is from Hadewisa, formed from the German name Hedvig, same as Edwig, which Wachter translates 'propugnator felicitatis;' say, 'fortunate soldier.'

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Countess Hawise de Quincy was born on 10 December 1184, in Winchester, Hampshire, England, her father, Saer de Quincy 1st Earl of Winchester, was 24 and her mother, Margaret de Beaumont, was 30. She married Sir Hugh de Vere 4th Earl of Oxford on 25 February 1223, in Winchester, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died on 3 February 1263, in Essex, England, at the age of 78, and was buried in Earls Colne, Essex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Countess Hawise de Quincy est née le 10 décembre 1184, à Winchester, Hampshire, Angleterre, son père, Saer de Quincy 1st Earl of Winchester, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Beaumont, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Hugh de Vere 4th Earl of Oxford le 25 février 1223, à Winchester, Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 3 février 1263, à Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 78 ans, et a été enterrée à Earls Colne, Essex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Countess Hawise de Quincy am 10. Dezember 1184 in Winchester, Hampshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Saer de Quincy 1st Earl of Winchester 24 und ihre Mutter Margaret de Beaumont 30. Sie hat am 25. Februar 1223 in Winchester, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom Sir Hugh de Vere 4th Earl of Oxford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 3. Februar 1263 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Essex, England und wurde in Earls Colne, Essex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Countess Hawise de Quincy è nata il il 10 dicembre 1184 nel Winchester, Hampshire, England, sua padre, Saer de Quincy 1st Earl of Winchester, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Margaret de Beaumont, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Sir Hugh de Vere 4th Earl of Oxford il 25 febbraio 1223, nel Winchester, Hampshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì il 3 febbraio 1263, nel Essex, England, all'età di 78 anni, e fu sepolta a Earls Colne, Essex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Countess Hawise de Quincyが1184年12月10日にイギリスハンプシュアイアウィンチェスターで生まれた時，父Saer de Quincy 1st Earl of Winchesterは24歳，母Margaret de Beaumontは30歳であった。1223年2月25日にイギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアウィンチェスターでSir Hugh de Vere 4th Earl of Oxfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1263年2月3日にイギリスエセックスで78歳で死去し，イギリスエセックスエアルルズ コルンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Countess Hawise de Quincy(이)가 1184년 12월 10일 영국 함프실르 윈체스터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Saer de Quincy 1st Earl of Winchester(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret de Beaumont(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1223년 2월 25일 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 윈체스터에서 Sir Hugh de Vere 4th Earl of Oxford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1263년 2월 3일 영국 에세스에서 78세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 에세스 에를스 코니에 묻혔다.

pt.10 December 1184–3 February 1263: 10 de dezembro de 1184–3 de fevereiro de 1263
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Countess Hawise de Quincy nasceu em 10 de dezembro de 1184, em Winchester, Hampshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Saer de Quincy 1st Earl of Winchester, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Beaumont, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Hugh de Vere 4th Earl of Oxford em 25 de fevereiro de 1223, em Winchester, Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 3 de fevereiro de 1263, em Essex, Inglaterra, com 78 anos, e foi sepultada em Earls Colne, Essex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Countess Hawise de Quincy родилась 10 декабря 1184 г. в местности винчестир, хампшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Saer de Quincy 1st Earl of Winchester было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Beaumont, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Hugh de Vere 4th Earl of Oxford 25 февраля 1223 г. в местности винчестир, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла 3 февраля 1263 г. в местности эссекс, Англия в возрасте 78 лет и была похоронена в местности эарлс колн, эссекс, Англия.

es.10 December 1184–3 February 1263: 10 de diciembre de 1184–3 de febrero de 1263
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Countess Hawise de Quincy nació el 10 de diciembre de 1184, en Winchester, Hampshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Saer de Quincy 1st Earl of Winchester, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Margaret de Beaumont, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Sir Hugh de Vere 4th Earl of Oxford el 25 de febrero de 1223, en Winchester, Hampshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió el 3 de febrero de 1263, en Essex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 78 años, y fue sepultada en Earls Colne, Essex, Inglaterra.
